title: plexipus incisus
intro: Plexipus incisus, also known as the Hairy Beggartick, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plexipus incisus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
